abstracts.abstract: By Representative Xiarhos of Barnstable, a petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 3817) of Steven George Xiarhos relative to the prohibition of motor vehicle operators to make turns at certain red lights.  Transportation.

bill.title: An Act regarding right of way violations (CeCelia's Law)

action.description: Committee reported that the matter be placed in the Orders of the Day for the next sitting
